# Amnos

> Privacy-first hardened Android browser built on WebView with zero persistent state and aggressive protection.

Amnos is an Android application designed for users who require high-security, ephemeral browsing. It prioritizes privacy over compatibility, featuring deterministic fingerprint silos, WebRTC/WebSocket suppression, and a zero-durable-state model.

## Core Features
- **Hardened WebView**: Custom `SecureWebView` with strict CSP and policy enforcement.
- **Privacy First**: No persistent cookies, cache, or storage; automatic wipe on session end.
- **Fingerprint Protection**: Deterministic profile generation and script-based obfuscation.
- **Security Dashboard**: Real-time visibility into tracker blocking and security status.
- **HTTPS-Only**: Forced secure connections with cleartext traffic disabled.

## Technical Stack
- **Languages**: Kotlin (Android Shell), JavaScript (Injection Scripts).
- **Core Components**: `SessionManager`, `NetworkSecurityManager`, `FingerprintManager`.
- **UI Framework**: Jetpack Compose.
- **Build System**: Gradle.

## Documentation
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Deep dive into the layered security design.
- [Security Audit](docs/SECURITY_AUDIT.md): Comprehensive review of security improvements and residual limits.
- [Validation Guide](docs/VALIDATION.md): Automated and manual testing protocols.
- [AI Instructions](docs/ai_instructions.md): Specific guidance for AI agents interacting with this codebase.

## Key Keywords
`privacy-browser`, `hardened-android`, `anti-fingerprinting`, `webrtc-leak-protection`, `ephemeral-browsing`, `webview-security`.
